title: begonia angularis
intro: Begonia angularis, also known as the Angle Begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Begonia angularis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as wounds, burns, and eczema. Herbal preparations of Begonia angularis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
